basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released through Advt. No. NITR/SR/2026/Advt.-24ER032/L/042 on the official website https://nitrkl.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit 28 years (relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female and 3 years for OBC-NCL)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PWD/Female: 5 years OBC (Non-creamy layer): 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Earth Sciences/Geophysics/Geodesy/Seismotectonics/Physics or a related field with 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA in 10 points scale with GATE or NET of UGC/CSIR, or any other national level exam.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc./M.Tech. in Earth Sciences/Geophysics/Geodesy/Seismotectonics/Physics or a related field with 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA in 10 points scale with GATE or NET of UGC/CSIR, or any other national level exam. Experience: Experience in processing and analyzing GNSS/GPS, Remote Sensing and InSAR data analysis. Understanding of tectonic deformation processes in seismically active regions. Proficiency in programming (Python, MATLAB, or similar) for data analysis and modeling. Desirable: Experience with FEM modeling or other numerical modeling tools. Familiarity with geodetic software and tools for strain analysis. Experience in GIS software for mapping and spatial analysis is an advantage. Experience in handling SAR data. Field Experience: Previous experience in fieldwork related to geodetic data collection is a plus.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000.00 /- per month for the first two years.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela is July 7, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc./M.Tech. in Earth Sciences/Geophysics/Geodesy/Seismotectonics/Physics or a related field with at least 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA, along with GATE or NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of INR 37,000.00 per month for the first two years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC-NCL candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email as a single PDF file containing all required documents and details. Hard copies are not required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITR/SR/2026/Advt.-24ER032 /L/042.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the National Institute of Technology Rourkela?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in processing and analyzing GNSS/GPS, Remote Sensing, and InSAR data, along with programming skills, is preferred. Experience with FEM modeling or GIS is also advantageous.
